label: Tabs
summary: Folder tabs over stacked panels; without the enhancer they are honest in-page links.
era: Manila folder tabs with the active lip merged into its page, the property-sheet look, brought to the web.

classes.name: rs-tabs__tab--active
classes.role: modifier: active lip merged into its panel

a11y: Unenhanced it is honest in-page links to headed, stacked sections, the snippet shows that shape. The enhancer adds role=tablist/tab/tabpanel, aria-selected and roving tabindex.
